100%Cloud Views
A Retreat Above The Mist

Where the Sky Meets Serenity

Perched high above the verdant valleys of Lakkidi, Mist View Resort is a place where ordinary life dissolves and something extraordinary begins. Wake to mornings draped in soft mist, with clouds drifting below your terrace as the sun rises over the Western Ghats.

Every detail at Mist View has been curated to honour the landscape that surrounds it. Our rooms frame panoramic valley vistas, and the open sky becomes your constant companion. This is not merely a stay - it is an immersion into nature's most breathtaking theatre.

From the moment you arrive at our hilltop sanctuary, you will understand what it truly means to wake up above the clouds.

Panoramic valley and cloud views
Premium rooftop terrace
Luxury nature retreat
Authentic Kerala hospitality
Perpetually fresh mountain air
Exclusive hilltop location
Why Mist View

Every Reason to Choose Us

Luxury Accommodation

Spacious rooms with bespoke wooden furnishings, premium linens, and floor-to-ceiling glass that frames living postcards of the Kerala hills.

Cloud View Experiences

Wake up to a sea of clouds from your rooftop terrace. Our elevated position offers views that transform hour by hour as mist rolls through the valleys.

Premium Hospitality

Our warm, attentive team delivers exceptional service with genuine Kerala warmth, anticipating every need before it arises.

Family Friendly

Thoughtfully designed for families and groups, with generous spaces, safe outdoor areas, and experiences that create memories for all ages.

Romantic Getaways

Couples discover pure magic here. Misty mornings, golden sunsets over the Western Ghats, and an atmosphere of serene togetherness.

Scenic Location

Set in Lakkidi, Wayanad - one of Kerala's most scenic highland destinations, nestled within the biodiversity-rich Western Ghats.

The Mist Experience

Life Above the Clouds

There is a particular quality of light at Mist View that exists nowhere else. It filters through low cloud in the early hours, turning the hillsides silver and jade. By afternoon the sky is vivid, the air clean and cool. By evening, the valleys fill with mist like a slowly rising tide.

Each moment here is a reminder that the natural world, at its finest, is the greatest luxury of all. Whether you come seeking solitude, romance, or family adventure, the clouds will welcome you home.

0Elevation

Discover Lakkidi

Kerala's Highland Treasure

Lakkidi sits at the crest of the Thamarassery Pass, one of the most dramatic mountain roads in Kerala. Shrouded in cloud for much of the year, this tiny highland hamlet is surrounded by dense shola forests, spice gardens, and tea estates that colour the hills in a thousand shades of green.

The climate here is perpetually cool and fresh, a rare gift in tropical Kerala. Mornings bring a misty hush, afternoons shimmer with filtered sunlight, and evenings glow amber as the sun descends behind the Nilgiri range. Cloud-watchers, naturalists, and those simply seeking peace all find their paradise here.

From Mist View Resort, the entire spectacle of Lakkidi unfolds before you, from the valley town of Kalpetta far below to the misty ridgelines stretching toward Tamil Nadu.

Western Ghats Cloud Forests Scenic Passes Tea Gardens Wildlife Trails Sunrise Points

Rooms That Frame The Sky

Each room at Mist View is a private sanctuary where clean design meets the raw beauty of the surrounding landscape.

Deluxe Room

Cloud View Suite

Elegant interiors with handcrafted teak furnishings, a king-size platform bed, and a glass-fronted facade that brings the clouds inside your space.

Forest Canopy Room

Guest Reviews

Voices from Above the Clouds

"I have stayed at luxury resorts across India and nothing quite prepared me for waking up at Mist View. The clouds were literally at window level. It felt like sleeping inside a dream. The room was immaculate, the team exceptional."

R
Rohit Menon
Bangalore, Karnataka

"The rooftop terrace at sunrise was worth every rupee. We watched the entire Lakkidi valley fill with mist as the sun rose - a sight I will carry for the rest of my life. Mist View is not just a resort; it is an experience that changes you."

P
Priya and Arjun Nair
Kochi, Kerala

"We brought the whole family and everyone was happy - the grandparents loved the cool climate and the children were fascinated by the clouds. The rooms are beautifully designed and spotlessly clean. Mist View sets a new standard in Kerala hospitality."

S
Suresh Krishnan
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
